{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032015530996FC9D002A10D4EFC067"}"},"total":5005},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7382021016343462681","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本小说在番茄里边儿有点儿牛逼，他竟然真的动脑子，并且还全是线索，虽然主角在作者这边儿的人设比作者本人的智商要低一些。但因为某些天赋原因主角也能在特定的时候下发挥出作者的智商，所以说这本书挺牛逼的，到目前为止全是干货非常推荐"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1718763702,"group_id":"7355632633700682776","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"懒惰的化身，咸鱼的代表","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/MrnOdlnex6oEkaYC82tU8=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1a44dc755496439cb6d6aff8603970d9~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776535967&x-signature=gpZ3lL1G3yTBj34%2BUz344qUXHoA%3D","user_id":"545773929898203","user_name":"薇妹只属于少佐"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"545773929898203","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7355632633700682776","book_info":{"abstract":"【玄幻，模拟器，苟，无女主，探索升级流；非纯爽文。】
【重要提示：现实很苟，以模拟为主。】
江逸枫穿越成了大幽国江氏商会的大少爷。
他本以为这是一个古代社会，他能勾栏听曲摆烂一生。
但在穿越的五年后，模拟器激活。
每次模拟都可以随机抽取不一样的天赋。
三分钟热度：你每天有三分钟特别热，特别坚挺。
健身高手：你锻体效果异与常人。
洞察之眼：可以看穿所有人的部分信息。
极限一换一：击杀你的人，会与你同时死亡。
……
第一次模拟时，江逸枫发现这个世界跟他了解的并不一样。
这里竟然有修仙者，而且在十多年后，会来灭自己的家族。
在此之后，为了自保，江逸枫开始不断的模拟！
模拟中，他不断探寻这个世界的真相，努力提升实力。
现实中他继续勾栏听曲。
多次模拟后，他发现原来他所在的之地不过是封禁之地，堪比牢笼。
在这里的人，禁止修仙，寻仙。
否则会被一个名叫仙临门的组织对其进行追杀。
这让江逸枫的安全感更低，他只能更加努力的模拟。
从模拟中兑换天赋，兑换修为……
不断的的模拟中，江逸枫发现这个世界的真相远不止那么简单。
甚至他自己以及身边的人，都似乎有非同寻常的来历。
而这一切，也在模拟中一点点浮现。
等到江逸枫无敌之时，发现的真相却是……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/266662f2e12b0857ebf42a7faff589f1","author":"第二十五时","author_id":"","book_id":"7355632633700682776","book_name":"继续模拟，我一定要活下去！","book_short_name":"命运模拟","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182820","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7357573115334885912","read_count":"33761","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1008306"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.4","serial_count":"479","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,架空,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/76ee784322709ab74db2dd4b21113949~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779177190&x-signature=RpG40GjWU5CvDsql4TuVhFap79U%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3927073668208727","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"158"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032015530996FC9D002A10D4EFC067"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读8小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":32,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":19450,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":27633,"reply_count":5,"show_pv":28242},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7600253745169941273","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"蛮好看的无Cp模拟文，升级节奏我认为不算快但也不拖沓。主角性格也不是天龙人或者很油腻的那种。
我觉得前期和中期好看（差不多至高神开始难看），秘密层层揭开，是有压力也有反制的节奏，不会那么快失去目标感，且不搞套娃。
后期节奏很慢，世界线和世界观铺开以后解释了一大堆很啰嗦很复杂的，时间线穿越轮回命运，黑袍白袍789。
一点铺垫都没有的写一堆很牛逼的角色，把主角套路成狗，给我看燃尽了。
不过整体感觉还行","text_exts":[{"e":36,"s":34,"text":"天龙","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%A4%A9%E9%BE%99&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231773993190D4EFC067%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227600253745169941273%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227355632633700682776%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%A4%A9%E9%BE%99%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769576172,"group_id":"7355632633700682776","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"喜欢基建争霸塔防天灾求生模拟器等无CP爽文。
雷，大量女性身材描写，主角身边全是女的然后搞雌竞，大量描写脑残反派猪队友无脑挑衅主角被打脸的剧情。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9TulPLihuaEzM7pFegMBU4=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c4b309a3be614015994510058f107723~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776535925&x-signature=I8O9mAmPJeBHSRTfdiDfcfZeXjs%3D","user_id":"796487207626813","user_name":"楼上吃我一棒"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"796487207626813","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7355632633700682776","book_info":{"abstract":"【玄幻，模拟器，苟，无女主，探索升级流；非纯爽文。】

isten_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":73752,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":6455},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7404464152307483417","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看到了276章，第一次看模拟类小说，比普通小说的信息量大挺多的，模拟的过程的也挺有意思，前面平行时空的各个发展，还有后面穿越到过去，主线就是修仙变强＋解密。中间有几个地方男主有点不是特别聪明但是勉强看的过去。看有的评论说让作者多写点模拟之外的生活，但我觉得现在这样专注写模拟之内的就挺好的。作者加油更啊！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1724069514,"group_id":"7355632633700682776","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"这个人很懒没有留下一句话","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7du5I+YJD/3scY16cKySTlPK5aNIExIeuebJOrluvVp","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/2a1e1b8cccd948088f5966ee159b7e67~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776528852&x-signature=Ci0XsrA%2FpKwah%2F0sWYjvCJ71IhY%3D","user_id":"2907539462947683","user_name":"深巷猫咪"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2907539462947683","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7355632633700682776","book_info":{"abstract":"【玄幻，模拟器，苟，无女主，探索升级流；非纯爽文。】
